title: Implement Keyboard Shortcuts and Accessibility
description: Add comprehensive keyboard navigation and shortcuts throughout the application. Implement focus management, skip links, ARIA labels, screen reader announcements. Test with VoiceOver/NVDA. Ensure all interactive elements keyboard-accessible. Create keyboard shortcut cheat sheet modal.
acceptance_criteria: Tab navigation follows logical order through all views
Focus visible ring (portal-green) on all interactive elements
Kanban shortcuts: arrow keys navigate, Enter opens ticket, N new ticket
ARIA labels on all buttons, cards, and dynamic content
Live regions announce agent status changes to screen readers
Skip to main content link for keyboard users
? key opens keyboard shortcut cheat sheet modal
Reduce motion respected for all animations
agent_output: Implemented keyboard shortcuts: D=Dashboard, 1-4=Views, Cmd+K=Search, Cmd+M=Meeseeks, Cmd+N=New Ticket, ?=Help. Includes KeyboardShortcutsHelp modal.
